data.text: Binance bets on Greek labour, security for EU growth, co-CEO Teng says
data.snippet: Binance co-CEO Richard Teng on Thursday said Greece's labour force and security profile gave it the edge over larger financial centres when the world's biggest cryptocurrency exchange was selecting a regulatory home in Europe.

image.text: Richard Teng, CEO of Binance, a cryptocurrency exchange, poses for a photo in Sydney, Australia, November 21, 2025.

relatedHeadlines.text: Crypto market volatility triggers $2.5 billion in bitcoin liquidations
Pakistan to allow Binance to explore 'tokenisation' of up to $2 billion of assets
relatedHeadlines.snippet: Pakistan has signed a memorandum of understanding with crypto exchange Binance to explore the "tokenisation" of up to $2 billion in sovereign bonds, T-bills and commodity reserves to boost liquidity and attract investors, the finance ministry said on Friday.

relatedHeadlines.text: Binance co-founder Yi He joins Richard Teng in dual leadership structure
relatedHeadlines.snippet: Binance, one of the world's largest cryptocurrency exchanges, named co-founder Yi He as its co-CEO on Wednesday, joining Richard Teng in a dual leadership structure.

data.text: Trump brothers-backed American Bitcoin swings to quarterly loss amid crypto selloff
data.snippet: American Bitcoin, backed by two of U.S. President Donald Trump's sons, swung to a fourth-quarter loss on Thursday amid a weakness in the digital assets space.

image.text: Representation of bitcoin cryptocurrency in this illustration created on September 10, 2025.

data.text: Brazilian digital bank Nubank's profit rises 50% in Q4 on customer growth
data.snippet: Nu Holdings, the listed entity that runs Brazilian digital lender Nubank, on Wednesday posted a 50% rise in its fourth-quarter net profit from a year earlier, as its customer base grew.

image.text: Nubank logo in this illustration taken November 27, 2025.

data.text: Fintech Chime sees 2026 revenue above estimates on strong demand, shares surge
data.snippet: Financial technology firm Chime forecast 2026 revenue above Wall Street estimates on Wednesday, helped by strong demand for its digital banking products and resilient consumer spending.

image.text: Chime logo in this illustration taken November 27, 2025.

data.text: Circle tops revenue expectations on strong stablecoin circulation, shares surge
data.snippet: Circle surpassed Wall Street expectations for fourth quarter revenue on Wednesday, as income from reserves got a boost from a rise in circulation of its stablecoin token, sending its shares up more than 20% in early trading.

image.text: A banner for Circle Internet Group, the issuer of one of the world’s biggest stablecoins, hangs on the front of the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) to celebrate the company’s IPO in New York City, U.S., June 5, 2025.

data.text: India's Yes Bank flags $280,000 in unauthorised forex card transactions
data.snippet: Indian lender Yes Bank said on Thursday that it had detected unauthorised transactions in its multi-currency prepaid forex cards.

image.text: A private security guard stands outside a branch of Yes Bank in New Delhi, India, August 30, 2024.

data.text: BREAKINGVIEWS-PayPal pursuit confronts a seller's dilemma
data.snippet: The $44 bln payments pioneer has attracted interest from potential suitors including Stripe, Bloomberg reported. The unlisted upstart's richer valuation means it could pay up and still profit. But PayPal's scale, strong cash flow and beaten-down stock make any deal a tough sell.

image.text: The PayPal logo is seen on a smartphone in front of the same logo displayed in this illustration taken September 8, 2021.

relatedHeadlines.text: Stripe is considering acquisition of all or parts of PayPal, Bloomberg News reports
relatedHeadlines.snippet: Payments firm Stripe is considering an acquisition of PayPal or parts of the digital payments pioneer, Bloomberg News reported on Tuesday, citing people familiar with the matter.
